name: Decision Drift
description: Advisory mod that flags new source evidence that appears to conflict with recorded decisions, ADRs, trust tiers, or governance docs.
advises_on: New source evidence that appears to conflict with recorded decisions, ADRs, trust tiers, or governance docs.
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Surfaces possible drift from recorded decisions; suggests review, never overwrites a record.
